arts.ttl: Liverpool could be without seven players vs Everton as Alexis Mac Allister banned for two matches
arts.sum: Liverpool will be left without a number of players through injury and suspension for Saturday's Merseyside derby away at Everton

arts.ttl: Liverpool news: Darwin Nunez urged to "accept" role as Virgil van Dijk issues warning
arts.sum: Liverpool be keen to bounce back from their 3-3 draw at Newcastle ahead of a crucial Merseyside derby against relegation candidates Everton, who picked up a 4-0 win over Wolves this week

arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes quiet Liverpool decision that could have huge impact as Everton game-changer named
arts.sum: Our Liverpool jury have their say on the result in Newcastle and the upcoming Merseyside derby against Everton

arts.ttl: Jordan Henderson makes Liverpool feelings clear in two-word message before Merseyside derby
arts.sum: Former Liverpool midfielder Jordan Henderson posted a message ahead of Saturday's showdown with Everton

arts.ttl: 'Liverpool fans should remember where Mohamed Salah's money will have to come from'
arts.sum: Transparency over Premier League players' wages might make supporters think twice when urging their clubs to break the bank for contracts and signings

arts.ttl: Arne Slot faces Darwin Nunez dilemma as Liverpool change confirmed for Everton
arts.sum: Arne Slot has a number of difficult decisions to make ahead of Liverpool's Premier League trip to Everton on Saturday

arts.ttl: Liverpool manager Arne Slot "receives apology" from Amazon Prime over false claims about referee interference
arts.sum: Amazon Prime reportedly issue an apology to Liverpool manager Arne Slot over false claims made towards manager during the 3-3 draw with Newcastle United

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah congratulated on new Liverpool contract as Reds 'give in to his demands'
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah's contract at Liverpool expires in the summer, but it appears he may be set to extend his stay at Anfield, according to a former Egypt international

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche warns Liverpool about Everton's set-pieces - and dismisses Arsenal approach
arts.sum: Sean Dyche says Everton have the tools at their disposal to harm Liverpool on set-pieces in Saturday afternoon's final ever Merseyside derby at Goodison Park

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche insists he doesn't need a set-piece coach and his old-school methods are the way forward - claiming he's 'got the wrong staff' at Everton if they can't work things out for themselves
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE: Since the boss took over at Everton, Dyche's side have scored more than all but Arsenal from dead-ball situations in the Premier League - and the Toffees do not have a set-piece coach.
